ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rate_classes" (
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate class */,
  "rate_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate class (e.g., Standard, Energy Only) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate class became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate class will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rate class is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "basic_monthly_charge" TEXT /* Basic monthly charge for the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the basic monthly charge became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the basic monthly charge will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the charge is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_charges_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_rates" (
  "demand_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand rate record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "demand_rate_per_kw" TEXT /* Demand rate per kW for the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the demand rate became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the demand rate will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the demand rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_rates_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_rates" (
  "energy_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy rate record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "energy_rate_per_kwh" TEXT /* Energy rate per kWh for the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy rate became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy rate will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the energy rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_rates_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_rates" (
  "fuel_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel rate record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "fuel_rate_per_kwh" TEXT /* Fuel rate per kWh for the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the fuel rate became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the fuel rate will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fuel rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_rates_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_rates" (
  "environmental_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental rate record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "environmental_rate_per_kwh" TEXT /* Environmental rate per kWh for the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental rate became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental rate will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the environmental rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environmental_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_rates_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_rates" (
  "total_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total rate record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "total_rate_per_kwh" TEXT /* Total rate per kWh for the rate class */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the total rate became effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the total rate will no longer be applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the total rate is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_rates_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer or business */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Indicates whether the customer is residential or commercial */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_rates" (
  "customer_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer rate record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class selected by the customer */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer started using the rate class */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer will no longer use the rate class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rate class is currently active for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_rates_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_rates_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_records" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the billing record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Billing period for the record */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount billed for the period */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date when the billing record was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the billing record (e.g., unpaid, paid, late) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_records" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "billing_period" TEXT /* Billing period for the usage record */,
  "kwh_used" TEXT /* Total kilowatt-hours (kWh) used during the billing period */,
  "peak_hours_used" TEXT /* Kilowatt-hours (kWh) used during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_hours_used" TEXT /* Kilowatt-hours (kWh) used during off-peak hours */,
  "total_demand" TEXT /* Total demand in kilowatts (kW) during the billing period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing record */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer, online payment) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_billing_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_id") REFERENCES billing_records ("billing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bill due, rate change, account update) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "rate_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate history record */,
  "rate_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rate class */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the new rate was effective */,
  "new_rate" TEXT /* New rate applicable from the effective date */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., basic monthly charge, demand rate, energy rate, fuel rate, environmental rate) */,
  "old_rate" TEXT /* Previous rate before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_rate_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_class_id") REFERENCES rate_classes ("rate_class_id")
)
